title: What's the Difference Between a Videographer and a Video Production Company?
excerpt: The terms get used interchangeably, but they describe fundamentally different things. Here's the honest breakdown of when each makes sense for your project.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Professional video production team at work in St. Augustine

content.alt: Video production company team with professional equipment
content.caption: A production company separates functions that a solo videographer combines

seo.title: Videographer vs Video Production Company | The Difference
seo.description: What's the difference between a videographer and a video production company? When to hire each and what the practical differences mean for your project.
